states.name: Lupin
states.title: Moonlight Phantom Thief
states.description:
Lupin is master thief whose exploits span the entire world.
With a deep love for works of art and national treasures, she steals any target she sets her sights on—no matter how impenetrable its security may be.
She is also known as a master of disguise, and no one knows her true face...except for one.

states.name: Lupin
states.title: Moonlight Phantom Thief
states.description:
Three years ago, she infiltrated the Kingdom of Wellmund in pursuit of the national treasure known as the "Swan Crown". Unable to break the final seal, she was just preparing to withdraw in defeat when Victoria, still a princess at the time, offered her assistance. With her aid, the theft was successful.
From that day on, Lupin began referring to the future queen as her one and only "accomplice".

states.name: Lupin
states.title: Moonlight Phantom Thief
states.description: Lupin had always loved ballet, and one day she happened to attend a performance by the Royal Ballet Troupe. The moment she saw her on stage, Lupin was utterly captivated. Movements as light as a feather, such graceful steps, and with a fleetingly delicate expression—she was the shining star at the center of the stage. From that day on, Lupin became an ardent fan, never once missing a regular performance by her "accomplice".
